title: Double Tomato Creamy Pasta
summary: Juicy cherry tomatoes and rich sundried tomato pesto make this silky pasta ridiculously tasty, and it’s all ready in 15.

method.description: Bring a pot of salted water to the boil. Once boiling, add the pasta and cook until al dente, following pack instructions.

Meanwhile, add the cherry tomatoes to a pan with a drizzle of olive oil and place over a medium heat. Gently cook the tomatoes, stirring occasionally, until they’ve softened. Season with salt, then stir the water and pesto through until saucy.

Using a slotted spoon, transfer the cooked pasta into the sauce. Turn the heat up to medium-high and toss everything together until nicely coated. Add a splash of pasta water to loosen the sauce, if needed. Taste and season with salt.
Stir three-quarters of the basil leaves through, then share between bowls. Grate over the Parmesan and top with the remaining basil leaves.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
